name: BEN_RPTG_GRP_VL
query: SELECT bnr.RPTG_GRP_ID, tl.NAME, bnr.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, bnr.RPTG_PRPS_CD, bnr.RPG_DESC, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE1, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE2, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE3, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE4, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE5, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE6, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE7, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE8, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE9, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE10, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE11, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE12, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE13, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE14, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE15, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE16, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE17, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE18, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE19, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE20, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE21, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE22, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE23, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE24, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE25, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE26, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE27, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE28, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE29, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE30, bnr.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, bnr.LAST_UPDATED_BY, bnr.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, bnr.CREATED_BY, bnr.CREATION_DATE, bnr.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, bnr.FUNCTION_CODE, bnr.LEGISLATION_CODE, bnr.ORDR_NUM, bnr.GLOBAL_FLAG, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, bnr.BNR_ATTRIBUTE_DATE15 FROM BEN_RPTG_GRP bnr, BEN_RPTG_GRP_TL tl WHERE bnr.RPTG_GRP_ID = tl.RPTG_GRP_ID AND tl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
